BookTitlePage.description:
Transcription of the book's title/cover page.

Exactly one transcript entry per book should carry this, with
page_type="title_page".
BookTitlePage.title: BookTitlePage

PracticeQuestion.description:
A single practice question.

Field names mirror the DB model (TextbookQuestion) so the ingestion
layer is a straightforward pass-through.

question_type.description: Determines how options and guide_answer are interpreted. See the QuestionType description for the full per-type contract.

question.description: The question text. For fill_in_the_blanks, blanks are denoted ___1___, ___2___, etc. (1-indexed).
question.title: Question

question_images.description: Bounding boxes of images that are part of the question.
question_images.title: Question Images

setup_text.description: Shared introductory text that applies to a group of related questions.
setup_text.title: Setup Text

guide_answer.description: The correct answer(s). Interpretation depends on question_type: free_form -> single-element list with the answer text; multiple_choice -> single-element list with the correct option text; checkbox -> list of every correct option text; fill_in_the_blanks -> ordered list of blank values (___1___ -> index 0, etc.); annotate -> single-element list with any textual answer component; matching -> list of "left_text:right_text" pairing strings; create_table -> single-element list with the table in markdown syntax.
guide_answer.title: Guide Answer

guide_pdf_page.description: PDF page index where the guide/teacher-edition answer is found.
guide_pdf_page.title: Guide Pdf Page

guide_answer_images.description: Bounding boxes of images in the guide that show the answer.
guide_answer_images.title: Guide Answer Images

options.description: Answer options when applicable. multiple_choice / checkbox: list of option texts. matching: left-column items, then "---" separator, then right-column items. All other types: null.
options.title: Options

PracticeQuestion.title: PracticeQuestion

QuestionType.description:
All question types a practice question can have.

Every type uses the same flat fields on PracticeQuestion; the table
below shows how each type maps to ``options`` and ``guide_answer``.

free_form
    Open-ended text answer.
    options: None
    guide_answer: single-element list with the answer text.

multiple_choice
    Exactly one correct option.
    options: list of option strings shown to the student.
    guide_answer: single-element list with the correct option text.

checkbox
    One or more correct options.
    options: list of option strings shown to the student.
    guide_answer: list of all correct option texts.

fill_in_the_blanks
    Blanks in the question text are denoted ``___1___``, ``___2___``, etc.
    options: None
    guide_answer: list of blank values in order (index-aligned with the
    blank markers).

annotate
    Student draws on an image/graph.  The question image bbox is the
    primary content; any textual answer goes in guide_answer.
    options: None
    guide_answer: single-element list (may be empty string if purely visual).

matching
    Linking items from two columns.
    options: left-column items, then the separator ``"---"``, then
    right-column items.  Example for 2 left + 3 right::

        ["Capital of France", "Capital of Germany", "---", "Berlin", "Paris", "Madrid"]

    guide_answer: list of ``"left_text:right_text"`` pairs describing
    the correct mapping.  Example::

        ["Capital of France:Paris", "Capital of Germany:Berlin"]

create_table
    Student fills in a table.  guide_answer contains the table in
    markdown syntax.
    options: None
    guide_answer: single-element list with the markdown table.
QuestionType.title: QuestionType

UnitPreamble.description:
Transcription of a unit's opening page.

Set this field on the first content page of each unit.  The unit's
page range is derived automatically: it starts at this page and ends
at the page before the next unit (or last page of the book).
UnitPreamble.title: UnitPreamble

book_title_page.description: Present only on the entry with page_type="title_page". Contains book-level metadata.

unit_preamble.description: Present on the first content page of each unit. Signals the start of a new unit.

lesson_preamble.description: Present on the first content page of each lesson. Signals the start of a new lesson.
